title: 23.5'' Round Adjustable Height Rustic Pine Wood Cocktail Table
features: Cocktail tables are one of the most essential items at any event or gathering.
The right table can become the center piece of your venue as your guests gather around and converse with their drinks of appetizers.
Our 23.5'' round swivel top wood cocktail table allows for ample space on the surface and the rustic walnut is as durable as much as it's beautiful.
A pneumatic adjustable lever resides under the 1'' top and allows you the option to use it at heights from 26.25'' to 35.5''.
The 17.5'' chrome base is a modern display of excellence and would compliment all its surroundings in any venue, restaurant, pub, business or even your own residential home.
